zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Bromwich於1395年出生在英國賀福爾薩內斯費爾德時，她的父親Thomas Bromwich35歲，母親Alice Oldcastle28歲。她和John Pembridge至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於大約1440年在英國英格蘭賀福爾波登哈姆享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Bromwich于1395年出生在英国賀福爾薩內斯費爾德时，她的父亲Thomas Bromwich35岁，母亲Alice Oldcastle28岁。她和John Pembridge至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于大约1440年在英国英格兰賀福爾波登哈姆享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Bromwich was born in 1395, in Sarnesfield, Herefordshire, England, her father, Thomas Bromwich, was 35 and her mother, Alice Oldcastle, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with John Pembridge. She died about 1440, in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Bromwich est née en 1395, à Sarnesfield, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bromwich, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Oldcastle, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec John Pembridge. Elle est décédée environ 1440, à Bodenham, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Pembridge, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Bromwich 1395 in Sarnesfield, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bromwich 35 und ihre Mutter Alice Oldcastle 28. Sie hatte mit John Pembridge mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1440 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Bodenham, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Pembridge, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Bromwich è nata il nel 1395 nel Sarnesfield, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Bromwich, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice Oldcastle, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con John Pembridge. Morì circa 1440, nel Bodenham, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Bromwichが1395年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアサルネスフィールドで生まれた時，父Thomas Bromwichは35歳，母Alice Oldcastleは28歳であった。彼女はJohn Pembridgeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1440年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアボデンハムで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアペンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Bromwich(이)가 1395년 영국 허퍼드실르 사른스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bromwich(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Oldcastle(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 John Pembridge(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 보데함에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 p브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Bromwich nasceu em 1395, em Sarnesfield, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Bromwich, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Oldcastle, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com John Pembridge. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1440, em Bodenham, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Pembridge, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Bromwich родилась в 1395 г. в местности сарнесфиелд, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bromwich было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Oldcastle, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от John Pembridge. Она умерла около 1440 г. в местности боденам, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности пембридж, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
